stemHtml:
Refer to figure.
A red circle is drawn on the chart highlighting an area between FL250 and FL360 along the planned route. What does this marked area most likely represent?

options.a: An area of moderate turbulence expected between FL250 and FL360.
options.b: An area of severe icing forecast between FL250 and FL360.
options.c: A region of moderate to severe clear air turbulence (CAT) associated with a jet stream core.
options.d: A zone of cumulonimbus (CB) cloud tops extending from FL250 to FL360.
